response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio matches the reference lyrics of both '六兆年と一夜物語' (Six Trillion Years and Overnight Story) and 'Star-mine'. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized for lyric transcription and translation. The performers for 'Star-mine' are Kazama Iroha, Tsunomaki Watame, and Momosuzu Nene. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed carefully to synchronize with the audio, matching the fast vocal pacing of the song structures and omitting subtitles during pure instrumental sections.

subtitles.original: 生まれついた時から
subtitles.english: From the moment I was born,

subtitles.original: 忌み子 鬼の子として
subtitles.english: as an unwanted child, as a demon child,

subtitles.original: その身に余る 罰を受けた
subtitles.english: I received punishment beyond what my body could bear.

subtitles.original: 悲しい事は 何も無いけど
subtitles.english: There wasn't really anything sad about it,

subtitles.original: 夕焼け小焼け 手を引かれてさ
subtitles.english: but at sunset, my hand was pulled.

subtitles.original: 知らない 知らない 僕は何も知らない
subtitles.english: I don't know, I don't know, I don't know anything,

subtitles.original: 叱られた後のやさしさも
subtitles.english: even the kindness after being scolded,

subtitles.original: 雨上がりの手の温もりも
subtitles.english: even the warmth of a hand after the rain.

subtitles.original: でも本当は 本当は 本当は 本当に寒いんだ
subtitles.english: But the truth is, the truth is, the truth is, it's really cold.

subtitles.original: 死なない 死なない 僕は何で死なない？
subtitles.english: I won't die, I won't die, why won't I die?

subtitles.original: 夢のひとつも見れないくせに
subtitles.english: Even though I can't even see a single dream.

subtitles.original: 誰も知らない おとぎばなしは
subtitles.english: The fairytale nobody knows

subtitles.original: 夕焼けの中に吸い込まれて消えてった
subtitles.english: was absorbed into the sunset and disappeared.

subtitles.original: 吐き出すような暴力と
subtitles.english: Like spitting out violence

subtitles.original: 蔑んだ目の毎日に
subtitles.english: and in every day with looking down eyes,

subtitles.original: 君はいつしかそこに立っていた
subtitles.english: before I knew it, you were standing there.

subtitles.original: 話しかけちゃだめなのに
subtitles.english: Even though you shouldn't talk to me,

subtitles.original: 「君の名前が知りたいな」
subtitles.english: "I want to know your name."

subtitles.original: ごめんね 名前も 舌も無いんだ
subtitles.english: "I'm sorry, I have no name, nor a tongue."

subtitles.original: 僕の居場所は 何処にも無いのに
subtitles.english: Even though I have no place to belong anywhere,

subtitles.original: 「一緒に帰ろう」 手を引かれてさ
subtitles.english: "Let's go home together," as my hand was pulled.

subtitles.original: 知らない 知らない 僕は何も知らない
subtitles.english: I don't know, I don't know, I don't know anything,

subtitles.original: 君はもう子供じゃないことも
subtitles.english: even that you are no longer a child.

subtitles.original: 慣れない他人の手の温もりは
subtitles.english: The unfamiliar warmth of another person's hand

subtitles.original: ただ本当に 本当に 本当に 本当のことなんだ
subtitles.english: is just really, really, really, really the truth.

subtitles.original: やめない やめない 君は何でやめない？
subtitles.english: Don't stop, don't stop, why won't you stop?

subtitles.original: 見つかれば殺されちゃうくせに
subtitles.english: Even though you'll be killed if they find you.

subtitles.original: 雨上がりに 忌み子が二人
subtitles.english: After the rain, two unwanted children

subtitles.original: 夕焼けの中に吸い込まれて消えてった
subtitles.english: were absorbed into the sunset and disappeared.

subtitles.original: 日が暮れて 夜が明けて
subtitles.english: The sun set, and the night broke,

subtitles.original: 遊び疲れて 捕まって
subtitles.english: tired of playing, we got caught.

subtitles.original: こんな世界
subtitles.english: In a world like this,

subtitles.original: 僕と君以外
subtitles.english: except for you and me,

subtitles.original: 皆居なくなればいいのにな
subtitles.english: I wish everyone else would just disappear.

subtitles.original: 知らない 知らない 声が聞こえてさ
subtitles.english: I heard an unfamiliar voice,

subtitles.original: 僕と君以外の 全人類
subtitles.english: and all of humanity except you and me,

subtitles.original: 抗う間もなく 手を引かれてさ
subtitles.english: with no time to resist, had their hands pulled,

subtitles.original: 夕焼けの中に吸い込まれて消えてった
subtitles.english: absorbed into the sunset and disappeared.

subtitles.original: 知らない 知らない 僕は何も知らない
subtitles.english: I don't know, I don't know, I don't know anything,

subtitles.original: これからのことも 君の名も
subtitles.english: not what's to come, nor even your name.

subtitles.original: 今は 今は これでいいんだと
subtitles.english: But for now, for now, "this is fine,"

subtitles.original: ただ本当に 本当に 本当に 本当に思うんだ
subtitles.english: is what I truly, truly, truly, truly think.

subtitles.original: 知らない 知らない あの耳鳴りは
subtitles.english: I don't know, I don't know, that ringing in my ears

subtitles.original: 夕焼けの中に吸い込まれて消えてった
subtitles.english: was absorbed into the sunset and disappeared.

subtitles.original: 風を置いて
subtitles.english: Leaving the wind behind,

subtitles.original: 雨を抜けて
subtitles.english: passing through the rain,

subtitles.original: 咲き誇れ
subtitles.english: bloom in full pride!

subtitles.original: あぁ、夜風に揺られている
subtitles.english: Ah, swaying in the night wind,

subtitles.original: 折れないように 怯えている
subtitles.english: afraid of breaking,

subtitles.original: ずっと雨に濡らされている
subtitles.english: always getting soaked in the rain,

subtitles.original: またどうしたって 凍えてしまったんだ
subtitles.english: and frozen up again anyway.

subtitles.original: 誰か この声に応答して
subtitles.english: Someone, respond to this voice.

subtitles.original: 痛がるばっかで 咲けないままのハートを
subtitles.english: With a heart that only feels pain and cannot bloom,

subtitles.original: あぁ、今
subtitles.english: ah, right now,

subtitles.original: 見逃せないくらい 綺麗に咲かせたいんだ
subtitles.english: I want to make it bloom beautifully so I can't look away.

subtitles.original: 光っていた未来が
subtitles.english: The future that was shining,

subtitles.original: ずっと待っていた世界が
subtitles.english: the world that was always waiting,

subtitles.original: きらめく音の中にあるなら
subtitles.english: if it's within the sparkling sound,

subtitles.original: 最低で最悪な涙も
subtitles.english: I want to take along even the worst, most terrible tears,

subtitles.original: 痛がりで嫌いな声も
subtitles.english: and the voice that hates feeling pain,

subtitles.original: 連れていきたいんだ 全部
subtitles.english: I want to take them all.

subtitles.original: 不完全な毎日が
subtitles.english: These incomplete days,

subtitles.original: 一瞬のカケラたちが 重なって
subtitles.english: these pieces of a moment overlap,

subtitles.original: こんな歌を奏でたら
subtitles.english: and if they play such a song,

subtitles.original: それは言葉だけじゃ届かない距離を
subtitles.english: it will surely cross the distance that words alone cannot reach,

subtitles.original: きっと飛び越えて 結ぶ
subtitles.english: and bind them together,

subtitles.original: きっと 輪を描いていく
subtitles.english: surely, it will draw a circle.
